title: PaintedPlanks
description: PaintedPlanks adds coloured versions of wooden planks to the game which can be crafted using wooden planks and dye.
body:
![PaintedPlanksLogo](https://i.imgur.com/GqbjNiA.png)

# **PaintedPlanks**





This mod adds coloured variants of the wooden planks to the game which can be crafted in the same way you would craft stained glass or terracotta.

If you would like to report a bug or see the development of my mods then be sure to join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/CzppBXkkhP)



# Installation Requirements
![Minecraft Forge Logo](https://files.minecraftforge.net/static/images/logo.svg)
![Neoforged logo](https://i.imgur.com/2Kx9kCN.png)


This mod is for [Minecraft Forge 1.20.1](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html) and [Neoforge 1.20.1](https://neoforged.net/)




# **Other Modloaders**

## **Fabric and Quilt**
![Minecraft fabric mod loader logo](https://fabricmc.net/assets/logo.png)
![QuiltMC logo](https://i.imgur.com/s0AjXOa.png)


As of now I have no interest in porting this mod to modloaders such as fabric and quilt.
If you wish to port the mod to these modloaders feel free to, I just request that you credit me in said port however this is not a requirement.



# Additional Information

The idea for PaintedPlanks started about a year ago when I was playing on my survival world. I wanted to make a structure out of wood however none of the in game planks matched the colour palette so I went on curseforge in search of a mod that added coloured planks to the game, however there were no such mods. This led me to attempt to create my own mod to do just that. The mod began development in forge and later moved over to fabric. However a lack of programming knowledge combined with a lack of interest in the game led me to abandon the project. In recent times I have gotten back into minecraft and after a conversation with my friend about Mojang's lack of interesting features (for us personally) in recent updates I decided to add some of the features I want in the game, leading to me picking up development on this mod, completely rewriting it from the ground up in forge, my preferred mod loader.
